title: Lesser & Pavey LP42493A Little Stars Unicorn Bowl
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 Piece Dinosaurs Bowl | 10 oz
COLORFUL DESIGN: This adorable Soup bowl features different Unicorns that will surely add excitement and pleasure to mealtime for your little girls.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: This adorable soup bowl makes a wonderful present for little boys for any occasion. Best paired with Beaker, Plate, food tray and Cutlery set with the same design.
HIGH QUALITY: This adorable soup bowl is made of Premium quality Plastic. It is lightweight but still very durable and 100% food-safe for children's use.
SAFE FOR KIDS: This adorable soup bowl is reusable and BPA-free making it safe for kids' meals.
description: From the manufacturer About us Established in 1971 by chairman and co-founder Ronnie Pavey, Lesser & Pavey have become one of the leading UK Trade Supplier of Giftware & Homewares. By priding ourselves on fantastic quality at great value for money, our brand "The Leonardo Collection" has become renowned worldwide. There's a huge range of Homeware, Ladies & Gents, Novelty and Souvenir gifts, plus seasonal lines for Birthdays, Christmas, Weddings and more. Whilst walking round, something is bound to catch your eye also which you might have otherwise missed.
